description: Document in Arabic, perhaps a receipt. Medieval-era. The second line mentions Ismaʿīl al-Simsār. This shelfmark was likely issued by the same scribe as the neighboring fragment T-S AS 185.282. Requires further examination.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
